name: GH_Item
summary: Represents a single data item in a chunk.

methods.name: CreateFrom(BinaryReader)
methods.summary: Creates a new instance of GH_Item and sets the fields from a reader object.

params.name: reader
params.doc: Reader object that defines the field data.

methods.name: CreateFrom(XmlNode)
methods.summary: Creates a new instance of GH_Item and sets the fields from an Xml node object.

params.name: node
params.doc: Xml node object that defines the field data.

methods.name: Read(BinaryReader)
methods.summary: Deserialize this item from a binary stream.

methods.name: Read(XmlNode)
methods.summary: Deserialize this item from an Xml node.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Converts the struct into a human readable format.

methods.name: Write(BinaryWriter)
methods.summary: Serialize this item into a binary stream.

throws.when: Thrown if !HasName.
Thrown if !HasType.
Thrown if the internal data could not be serialized.

methods.name: Write(XmlWriter)
methods.summary: Serialize this item into an Xml stream.

throws.when: Thrown if !HasName.
Thrown if !HasType.
Thrown if the internal data could not be serialized.

properties.name: _bool
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Boolean. If the data is not stored as a Boolean, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _boundingbox
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a BoundingBox. If the data is not stored as a BoundingBox, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _byte
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Byte. If the data is not stored as a Byte, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _bytearray
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Byte array. If the data is not stored as a Byte array, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _date
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a DateTime. If the data is not stored as a DateTime, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _decimal
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Decimal. If the data is not stored as a Decimal, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _double
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Double. If the data is not stored as a Double, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _doublearray
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Byte array. If the data is not stored as a Byte array, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_bitmap
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Bitmap. If the data is not stored as a Bitmap, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_color
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Color. If the data is not stored as a Color, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_point
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Point. If the data is not stored as a Point, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_pointf
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a PointF. If the data is not stored as a PointF, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_rectangle
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Rectangle. If the data is not stored as a Rectangle, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_rectanglef
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a RectangleF. If the data is not stored as a RectangleF, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_size
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Size. If the data is not stored as a Size, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _drawing_sizef
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a SizeF. If the data is not stored as a SizeF, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _guid
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Guid. If the data is not stored as a Guid, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _int32
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to an Int32. If the data is not stored as an Int32, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _int64
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to an Int64. If the data is not stored as an Int64, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _interval1d
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to an Interval1D. If the data is not stored as an Interval1D, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _interval2d
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to an Interval2D. If the data is not stored as an Interval2D, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _line
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Line. If the data is not stored as a Line, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _plane
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Plane. If the data is not stored as a Plane, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _point2d
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Point2D. If the data is not stored as a Point2D, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _point3d
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Point3D. If the data is not stored as a Point3D, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _point4d
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Point4D. If the data is not stored as a Point4D, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _single
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Single. If the data is not stored as a Single, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _string
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a String. If the data is not stored as a String, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: _version
properties.summary: Returns the internal data of this item cast to a Version. If the data is not stored as a Version, a conversion exception might be thrown.

properties.name: HasIndex
properties.summary: Gets the index existence implication. The item is considered to have an index qualifier if the index value is larger than or equal to zero.

properties.name: HasName
properties.summary: Gets the name validity of this item. The item is considered to have an invalid name if string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)

properties.name: HasType
properties.summary: Gets the type set validity of this item. The item is considered to have a type if type != GH_Types.unset

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets or sets the index of an item. Typically, indices are set at construction and do not change. If you change indices after construction, you could corrupt an archive.

properties.name: InternalData
properties.summary: Retrieves the internal data of this item. No type casting is performed.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of this item. Typically, names are set at construction and do not change. If you change names after construction, you could corrupt an archive.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Gets the type of this item. Type flags are set during construction and cannot be altered.
